notes: The intuit adaptor is a thin HTTP wrapper (request/get/post via re-exported http) over the Intuit QuickBooks Online Accounting API v3. Intuit publishes docs but no consolidated public OpenAPI. Authored a focused OpenAPI 3.0.3 covering the core accounting entities and the query endpoint under /v3/company/{realmId}, matching Intuit's documented request/response envelopes (entity wrapped as {"Customer": {...}, "time": ...}; query returns {"QueryResponse": {...}}). Base server is the sandbox host from the config schema.
